---
title: "Sahil Ashish Bhattacharya"
format: html
page-layout: full
about:
    template: trestles
    image: images/logo.png
    image-width: 16em
    image-shape: round
    links:
        - icon: linkedin
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sahil-bhattacharya-257924228
          target: _blank
          text: LinkedIn
        - icon: github
          href: https://github.com/saahi0206
          target: _blank
          text: GitHub
        - icon: envelope
          href: mailto:saahil.bhatt30@gmail.com
          text: Email
        - text: "📄 CV"
          href: cv/sahil-bhattacharya-cv.pdf
          target: _blank
---

## Welcome 👋

I'm **Sahil Ashish Bhattacharya**, an MSc Business Analytics student at **Dublin City University (DCU)**, Dublin, Ireland.

My work sits at the intersection of data, technology, and business strategy. I am passionate about **Machine Learning**, **Artificial Intelligence**, **Data Analytics**, and **Python** — and how these tools can create measurable impact in real-world business contexts.

Through my MSc programme I have worked on applied projects spanning CRM strategy, NLP text classification, and transformer-based AI modelling. I am actively seeking internship and graduate opportunities where I can apply these skills.

Explore my projects and reflections using the navigation above. 🚀
